title: Benefit income - Canada.ca
content:
Find out about reporting income that you received that is related to benefits.

## Types of benefit income
- Line 11700 – Universal child care benefit ( UCCB ) Report the amount of the universal child care benefit that you or your spouse or common-law partner received.
- Line 11900 – Employment insurance and other benefits Find, calculate and report the amount of employment insurance and other benefits you received.
- Line 14400 – Workers' compensation benefits Report the amount of workers’ compensation benefits you received.
- Line 14500 – Social assistance payments Report the amount of social assistance payments you received.
- All types of income List of the types of income to report on your income tax and benefit return.

## Forms and publications
- Claiming deductions, credits and expenses

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
